summary: Kiosk Station 3 audio cuts out on the Ruthie oral history clip at 3:47
description: Reproduced on the staging build, Station 3 PWA, two consecutive runs. Audio buffer underruns between 3:47 and 4:12 of the Ruthie Mae Mitchell interview clip. Heartbeat stays green, no kiosk reboot is triggered. Possibly related to the AudioPlaybackBuffer error class our vendor flagged in the Sentry dashboard last week. Vendor is investigating a retry hotfix.

summary: AudioPlaybackBuffer underrun on the Ruthie clip needs a retry shim
description: Followup to CME-141. Vendor proposes a one shot retry on the audio decoder when the buffer underrun event fires. Hotfix branch is hotfix/kiosk-audio-buffer and the candidate PR is PR #147 against cornerstone-museum/exhibits. Waiting on museum review before merge. Do not let this slip past opening day.

summary: Kiosk Station 8 content load returns 404
description: Station 8 (Jubilee Singers) shows a blank content panel and the kiosk logs a 404 from the headless content API. The canonical content slug the kiosk is requesting is oh-station-08-jubilee-singers but the entry does not appear to exist on the content side. Either the slug is wrong or the entry was never created. Needs eyes from the curatorial team before opening. This is blocking Station 8 entirely.
